steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We're given $p(n) = 7n^3$ and need $p(n) = 56$. Set the function equal to 56:
$$7n^3 = 56$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 7:
$$n^3 = 8$$
Take the cube root of both sides:
$$n = \sqrt[3]{8} = 2$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
